task: Audit Epic 07 truth and roadmap exhaustion
acceptance_criteria: Repo truth confirms Epic 07 is fully closed and no unfinished roadmap epic remains
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q '进度: 6/6' .codex-tasks/20260420-oracle-data-plane-epic/PROGRESS.md && grep -q '| 07 | Oracle Data Plane and Minimum Insights | Done |' EPIC_ROADMAP.md\""
notes: Confirmed Epic 07 is signed off and the current roadmap snapshot has no remaining non-Done epic to activate

task: Write post-Epic-07 close-out review and transition gate
acceptance_criteria: Close-out review explicitly records what Epic 07 proved, what it did not prove, and why the next step is roadmap extension rather than immediate activation
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Close-Out Review' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic07-transition-review/PROGRESS.md && grep -q 'roadmap 01-07 已全部完成' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic07-transition-review/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: The review records both roadmap exhaustion and the explicit remaining repo gaps that should feed the next roadmap extension

task: Validate close-out artifact and freeze phase-2 boundary
acceptance_criteria: Review artifact states that phase 2 is blocked on roadmap extension and does not materialize a new epic early
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'phase 2' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic07-transition-review/PROGRESS.md && grep -q '下一步不是激活新的既有 epic' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic07-transition-review/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: Static validation passed and the roadmap still has no `Active` epic, so phase separation remains intact after Epic 07 close-out
